title: Deploying Amazon RDS for Db2 using Terraform
text: Customers running IBM Db2 workloads often ask for a repeatable, auditable way to provision Amazon RDS for Db2 that fits their existing infrastructure-as-code practice. In this post, we introduce a modular Terraform template, published in the aws-samples/sample-rds-db2-tools repository. The template takes you from an empty AWS account to a running RDS for Db2 instance tracked in AWS License Manager in under an hour.
